title: Build submissions list page with filter, search, and pagination
completion_summary: Built submissions list API route with filtering/pagination, filter components with URL-synced search params, responsive table/card views, loading state, and empty state. Sidebar link already exists.
acceptance_criteria: Server component fetches submissions scoped to authenticated store with Prisma
Filter controls: dropdown by quiz name, date range picker (from/to), text search on email/name/sessionId
Table displays columns: date, quiz name, email, name, status (completed/abandoned), result title
Pagination with page size selector (10/25/50) using cursor or offset pagination
URL search params sync with filters for shareable/bookmarkable URLs
Rows link to submission detail page /submissions/[id]
Empty state rendered when no submissions match filters
Loading state shown during navigation (Suspense fallback)
Page follows existing admin layout pattern (server component with client islands)
Responsive at all breakpoints (table collapses on mobile, filters in a Sheet)
